englishDefinitions: To take over someone's role, job, or responsibilities, especially after they leave.
To be able to do as well as someone who was in that position before.
persianTranslation: مسئولیت‌های کسی را بر عهده گرفتن
examples: It won't be easy to fill her shoes after she retires.
The new manager struggled to fill the former director's shoes.
Nobody can truly fill his shoes, but someone has to take the job.
